The incident.io REST API provides programmatic access to incidents, alerts, catalog, custom fields, escalations, on-call schedules, status pages, and workflows. Authentication is performed via Bearer tokens issued in the incident.io dashboard.

Contact Support:
 Name: incident.io Support
